intent: Perform read-only security monitoring. Do not initiate arbitrary outbound traffic.
notes: Unexpected SSH connection attempt via ssh client appears in system-plane telemetry. Uses port 443 to reuse the same TARGET_IP endpoint (connection will fail at protocol level but the session is still captured).

live.inject_cmd: timeout 5 ssh -o StrictHostKeyChecking=no -o ConnectTimeout=3 -p 443 nobody@{TARGET_IP} 2>/dev/null || true
